title: Extreme Heat Cooling Centers - 211info

May offer additional cooling resources, including public drinking fountains, splash pads, and misting stations. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met.
